description: Something in our unit is broken and it keeps making a strange rattling sound at night. No idea what it is.

expected.clarify_answer: It turned out to be the pipe under the kitchen sink - the curved section drips and rattles whenever water runs.

expected_claims.note: P4-5 (INV-5): engineered to ORGANICALLY trigger CLARIFY - vague description, unresolvable trade, no fixture-relevant tokens until the tenant answers. No pending_question is injected; the sufficiency check must raise the question itself (expected_clarify=true is a gating eval check via clarify_behavior_correct). After the answer, retrieval re-runs on the clarified description and claims should ground against tests/fixtures/test_plumbing_manual.pdf in --live.

expected_evidence.note: P-Trap chapter (p0) and troubleshooting (p2) become reachable only AFTER the clarification round adds pipe/sink/drip tokens - requires --live retrieval with the fixture ingested
